title: Adding Guest
excerpt:

I see that Guest have to have a different email extension. We are just using gmail acc…

posts.author: clgrimes (Cheryl)
posts.cookedHtml:
As we are just getting starting as a business; our team is only 3 people but we have contractors so we will be adding them as Guest.

I see that Guest have to have a different email extension. We are just using gmail accounts right now and not a company email.

So would I be correct in stating the guest will not be added since they have a gmail? As I am the one creating the boards etc if I change my email to a different extension (ie from clgrimes@gmail.com to clgrimes@protonmail.com) will it work?

As soon as we get our website running I can move to company extension

If that wont work; please let me know if anyone has a solution

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see this as an issue - I tested it on my enterprise account and on my free account and I was able to add users with a different email extension. Is your board of type sharable?
